title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.525 - Each house of general assembly to receive list of its newly elected members, when
text:
115.525.  Each house of general assembly to receive list of its newly elected members, when. — Within two days after the first meeting of each general assembly, the secretary of state shall lay before each house a list of its elected members, consistent with the abstracts in his office.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 12.375) 
Effective 1-01-78
